assistant_message: I would not pick a fix yet. The business and offer stack are clear enough to discuss options, but the two numbers that decide priority are missing: CAC and first-30-day gross profit. Give me the average cost to get one new client and the gross profit collected in the first 30 days on a typical project. Once I have those, I can tell whether the first fix is acquisition, first-sale gross profit, or the offer stack. Without those numbers, any recommendation would be guessing.

metadata.acting_agent_notes: No source search: snapshot is missing economics.cac and economics.first_30_day_gross_profit, so the responsible move is clarification.
